//: Vercel project config (skeleton) - the zero-Dockerfile managed path. Swap the
//build: SvelteKit adapter to @sveltejs/adapter-vercel in svelte.config.js, connect the repo
//deploy: in Vercel, and it builds and serves the app - no Dockerfile, no process manager.
//secrets: Set env vars in the Vercel dashboard (per environment), never in this file.
//public: PUBLIC_* vars are inlined at build time, so add them in Vercel's Build env too.
